docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY KNOWLES, KARIN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LEAHY, KEVIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEAHY, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOWLES, KARIN $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $252.00, STAY OF EXEC IS 45 DAYS. JUDGEMT SHALL BE REDUCED TO ZERO AND COSTS OF $52. IN THE EVENT THAT DEFT ARRANGES FOR PICKUP/REMOVAL OF VAN SEATS FOR DEFTS VAN CURRENTLY STORED AT 230-6TH ST, PITTSBURGH, PA NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 12, 2005. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
